UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Carmen Jimenez is present.
Attorney Danny Wang appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Robyn Marino is present.
Attorney Marianne M. Dickson representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Sep-4-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
